steps.title: Keep the title with the name
steps.content: The blank places the title "dendrochronologist" immediately before the proper name Valerie Trouet. A professional title used directly before a name should not be separated from that name by punctuation.

steps.title: Avoid splitting title and name
steps.content: A separates the title from the name with a colon. B separates them with a comma, and C separates them with a dash. No punctuation should interrupt the title-name unit. The answer is D.
